package rulecoverage

func NegativeRedisConnectionPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "redis_connection_per_request"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{...})` inside handler/request functions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
